name: NPC Incorporated
summary: NPC Incorporated engages in the machinery and environmental businesses. The company researches and develops, and sells various equipment, including photovoltaic (PV) module manufacturing equipment, automated/labor-saving machines, vacuum bonding machines, VIP sealing machines for the packing of vacuum insulation panels and other special-purpose vacuum packing machines, etc. It also offers products and services related to PV panels, PV panel inspection devices, PV panel disassembly equipment, PV panel inspection and maintenance services, PV panel reuse/recycling services, etc. The company's PV module manufacturing equipment include cell testers, tabbing and stringing machines, layup machines, module laminators, module testers, and laser inspection machines; and other machines comprise EL inspection machines, sheet feeding machines, automated framing machines, automated trimming machines, and bussing machines. Its products also include I-V measurement systems and onsite EL/PL inspection machines. The company operates in approximately 50 countries/areas. NPC Incorporated was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
